_README: Curated, SOURCED facts per surah. Single source of truth for scripts so videos draw from verified data, not model memory. Every entry must have a citation. Verse text itself is NOT stored here (always auto-pulled from Quran.com by reference); this holds structural facts, counts, and authentic-hadith references with grading. Review/extend with a knowledgeable person before relying on new entries. Verse counts follow the Hafs/Kufan count.

hadith.topic: Recite Ayat al-Kursi at night: a guardian from Allah stays, no devil approaches until morning
Ayat al-Kursi is the greatest verse in the Book of Allah (Ubayy ibn Ka'b)

hadith.ref: Sunan an-Nasa'i (al-Kubra), graded sahih by al-Albani
hadith.topic: Recite Ayat al-Kursi after every obligatory prayer; nothing keeps one from Paradise but death

structure.fact: Four narratives: the People of the Cave, the man with two gardens, Musa and al-Khidr, Dhul-Qarnayn

hadith.topic: Whoever memorizes the first ten verses of al-Kahf is protected from the Dajjal (some narrations: the last ten)

hadith.ref: al-Hakim / al-Bayhaqi, graded sahih by al-Albani
hadith.topic: Reciting Surah al-Kahf on Friday: light between the two Fridays

structure.fact: The refrain 'fa-bi-ayyi ala'i rabbikuma tukadhdhiban' recurs 31 times
The refrain is DUAL (rabbikuma/tukadhdhiban), addressing two parties: jinn and mankind
structure.source: Quran 55:33 ('O company of jinn and mankind'); cf. 55:31 'al-thaqalan'

structure.fact: Four gardens: two (55:46) and two more besides them (55:62)

hadith.topic: Popular virtue-narrations for Ar-Rahman are contested in grading; keep this surah Quran-only

notable.note: Created death and life to test which of you is best in deed

hadith.topic: A surah of 30 verses interceded for a man until he was forgiven: Surah al-Mulk
The Prophet would recite al-Mulk before sleeping
